damage.description: Water damage to kitchen subfloor, lower cabinets, and adjoining drywall

water_source_ambiguous.note: Reported as sudden supply-line burst, but plumber notes corrosion consistent with slow long-term leak

moisture_predates_loss.note: Moisture-meter readings and subfloor staining indicate intrusion began weeks before reported incident_date

narrative: Claimant reports a sudden kitchen supply-line burst causing extensive water damage. Requests full subfloor and cabinet replacement at an amount above the documented repair estimate.
